form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since he finished last of 13 at this track January 13 over 1000m, 30 len behind St Harry carrying 58.5kg at $9. On debut fourth in a small field at this track December 6 over 1000m, 5 len behind Catwalk King carrying 58.5kg at $8. Top hope if back in good order.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At very long odds at debut, 9th of 12 at this track on January 10 over 1000m, 11 len behind Champagne Castle carrying 59kg at $101. Last start 8th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1000m, 6 len behind World Series carrying 60kg at $51. Will find this too tough.
